name: ddaro
description: Worktree-based parallel workflow for Claude Code sessions. 6-tier classification (main / owned / adopted / protected / unmanaged / external), /ddaro:adopt to bring existing worktrees under management, cwd-safe destructive commands (clear/abandon run from main only), merge hand-off, and opt-in main_protection hooks (off/warn/strict). Korean triggers: /ddaro, 따로, 병렬로. English: /ddaro, parallel, isolated.
